message:
fix: treat adoption psychology issues as bonus in auto-qa (#3786)

* fix: treat adoption psychology issues as bonus in auto-qa

Adoption & engagement psychology findings were never creating issues
because they were pushed last in the checks array and the maxIssues
cap (3) was always reached by earlier findings. Mark adoption checks
as bonus so they bypass the cap and always get created.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

* fix: improve warning message and add createdTotal counter for accurate reporting

- Reword warning from 'Rate limit reached' to 'Max issues cap reached' to
  avoid confusion with GitHub API rate limits
- Add createdTotal counter that increments for every created issue (including
  bonus) so the final summary log correctly reflects total issues created
- Keep created counter for cap/delay gating (non-bonus only)
- Final log now shows both: total created and how many counted against cap

Signed-off-by: copilot <copilot@github.com>

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kubestellar/console/sessions/f46d0430-302c-4ff3-aab0-f6abb25d5981

Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
